question_en: DX1_1 How important are the following aspects when making a decision on what products (goods or services) to buy? The impact on the environment of the product | Base: All

question_en: DX1_3 How important are the following aspects when making a decision on what products (goods or services) to buy? The quality of the product | Base: All

question_en: DX1_4 How important are the following aspects when making a decision on what products (goods or services) to buy? The brand of the product | Base: All

question_en: DX2_1 To what extent do you agree or disagree with the following statements? Buying products with a lower environmental impact makes a difference for the environment | Base: All

question_en: Q1 Please take a close look at the logo shown below. Have you seen this logo before? | Base: All

question_en: Q2_1 The logo shown is that of the EU Ecolabel. Which of the following statements about the EU Ecolabel do you think are true or false? The EU Ecolabel is awarded to products with a lower environmental impact than similar products on the market | Base: All
question_type_explanation: It is a factual/awareness question about the EU Ecolabel.

question_en: Q2_2 The logo shown is that of the EU Ecolabel. Which of the following statements about the EU Ecolabel do you think are true or false? The EU Ecolabel is an independently verified  label that companies can decide to display on their products to show they are environmentally friendly | Base: All

question_en: Q2_4 The logo shown is that of the EU Ecolabel. Which of the following statements about the EU Ecolabel do you think are true or false? The EU Ecolabel is the European Union label for environmental excellence | Base: All

question_en: Q2_5 The logo shown is that of the EU Ecolabel. Which of the following statements about the EU Ecolabel do you think are true or false? To get the EU Ecolabel, products have to comply to strict environmental criteria | Base: All

question_en: QA1 Do you think that, in the EU, agriculture and rural areas are ... for our future? (ONE ANSWER ONLY)
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do regarding agriculture and rural areas, making it a forward-looking opinion.

question_en: QA2 Have you ever heard of the support that the EU gives farmers through its Common Agricultural Policy (CAP)? (ONE ANSWER ONLY)
question_type_explanation: References an EXISTING policy as already in place

question_en: QA3 To what extent do you agree or disagree with the following statement: the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) benefits all European citizens and not only farmers. (ONE ANSWER ONLY)
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do, specifically regarding the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP).

question_en: QA4 In your opinion, which of the following should be the main objectives of the EU in terms of agriculture and rural development policy? (MULTIPLE ANSWER POSSIBLE)
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion on what the EU should do in terms of agriculture and rural development policy, making it a forward-looking opinion.

question_en: QA5.1 To what extent do you think the EU through the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) is fulfilling its role in ... ? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Ensuring a fair standard of living for farmers
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do through the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP), specifically ensuring a fair standard of living for farmers.

question_en: QA5.2 To what extent do you think the EU through the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) is fulfilling its role in ... ? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Creating growth and jobs in rural areas
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do through the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP), specifically in creating growth and jobs in rural areas.

question_en: QA5.3 To what extent do you think the EU through the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) is fulfilling its role in ... ? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Ensuring reasonable food prices for consumers
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do through the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP), specifically ensuring reasonable food prices for consumers.

question_en: QA5.4 To what extent do you think the EU through the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) is fulfilling its role in ... ? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Securing a stable supply of food in the EU
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do through the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP), specifically regarding securing a stable supply of food in the EU.

question_en: QA5.5 To what extent do you think the EU through the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) is fulfilling its role in ... ? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Ensuring a sustainable way to produce food
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do through the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) to ensure a sustainable way to produce food.

question_en: QA5.6 To what extent do you think the EU through the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) is fulfilling its role in ... ? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Protecting the environment and tackling climate change
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do through the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) regarding protecting the environment and tackling climate change.

question_en: QA5.7 To what extent do you think the EU through the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) is fulfilling its role in ... ? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Providing safe, healthy food of high quality
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do through the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP), specifically in providing safe, healthy food of high quality.

question_en: QA6 What do you think should be the two main responsibilities of farmers in our society? (TWO ANSWER MAXIMUM)
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion on what the responsibilities of farmers should be, which is a forward-looking opinion about EU policy.

question_en: QA7.1 How important do you think the following priorities of the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) are? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Developing research and digital solutions to support the agriculture and food sectors (M)
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do in terms of developing research and digital solutions for agriculture.

question_en: QA7.2 How important do you think the following priorities of the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) are? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Strengthening the farmer's role in the food chain
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do in terms of prioritizing the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP), specifically strengthening the farmer's role in the food chain.

question_en: QA7.3 How important do you think the following priorities of the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) are? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Encouraging young people to enter the agricultural sector
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do (encourage young people to enter the agricultural sector) in relation to the Common Agricultural Policy.

question_en: QA7.4 How important do you think the following priorities of the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) are? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Boosting investment and growth, and increasing the number of jobs in the agriculture and food sectors (N)
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do (prioritize investment and growth in agriculture and food sectors)

question_en: QA7.5 How important do you think the following priorities of the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) are? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Help tackle climate change (N)
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do in terms of tackling climate change within the Common Agricultural Policy.

question_en: QA7.6 How important do you think the following priorities of the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) are? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Securing a stable supply of food in the EU (N)
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about the priority of a potential action (the Common Agricultural Policy) within the EU, making it a forward-looking opinion.

question_en: QA7.7 How important do you think the following priorities of the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) are? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Ensuring sustainable management of natural resources (N)
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD prioritize in its Common Agricultural Policy.

question_en: QA7.8 How important do you think the following priorities of the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) are? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Reducing disparities in the development of different regions and territories of the EU (N)
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD prioritize in its Common Agricultural Policy.

question_en: QA8.1 Do you agree or not that the Common Agricultural Policy (CAP) contributes to ... ? (ONE ANSWER ONLY):-Developing research, and digital solutions to support the agriculture and food sectors (N)

question_en: QA22 European Parliament elections were held on the (INSERT CORRECT DATE ACCORDING TO COUNTRY). For one reason or another, some people in (OUR COUNTRY) did not vote in these elections. Did you yourself vote in the last European Parliament elections?
question_type_explanation: This question asks for personal behavior, not a forward-looking opinion about what the EU should do.

question_en: QA23 Each European political family can choose a lead candidate before the European Parliament elections. Such lead candidates can play a prominent role during the campaign all across the EU and can be the candidate of their political family to become President of the European Commission. Are you in favour of such a process or not?
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do in the future

question_en: QA24 In the last European Parliament elections, EU citizens could vote for lists in a national frame. For example, an EU citizen living in (COUNTRY) could vote for a list in (COUNTRY). It is currently debated that in the future EU citizens could have the possibility to vote in addition also for transnational lists. Such lists would gather candidates from different EU countries and all EU citizens could then vote for the same transnational lists. Do you think that this would be:
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do in the future

question_en: QA25.1 To what extent do you agree or disagree with the following statements regarding the fact that the lead candidates chosen by the European political families could become the President of the European Commission (according to the European election results):-It would represent significant progress for democracy within the EU
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do in terms of democracy progress

question_en: QA25.2 To what extent do you agree or disagree with the following statements regarding the fact that the lead candidates chosen by the European political families could become the President of the European Commission (according to the European election results):-It would bring more transparency to the process of electing the President of the European Commission
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do to bring more transparency to the process of electing the President of the European Commission.

question_en: QA25.3 To what extent do you agree or disagree with the following statements regarding the fact that the lead candidates chosen by the European political families could become the President of the European Commission (according to the European election results):-It would give more legitimacy to the European Commission

question_en: QA25.4 To what extent do you agree or disagree with the following statements regarding the fact that the lead candidates chosen by the European political families could become the President of the European Commission (according to the European election results):-It would have no real impact, it would not change much
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do in terms of selecting the President of the European Commission.

question_en: QA25.5 To what extent do you agree or disagree with the following statements regarding the fact that the lead candidates chosen by the European political families could become the President of the European Commission (according to the European election results):-It would prevent Member States' governments from choosing the best candidate for the job
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do regarding the selection process of the President of the European Commission.

question_en: QA25.6 To what extent do you agree or disagree with the following statements regarding the fact that the lead candidates chosen by the European political families could become the President of the European Commission (according to the European election results):-It would only make sense if EU citizens were given the possibility to vote for transnational lists
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what the EU SHOULD do in terms of allowing voters to choose transnational lists for the President of the European Commission.

question_en: Q2 To what extent would you trust social media content to help you make financial decisions? | Base: All
question_type_explanation: It does not ask for citizens' opinion on what the EU should do regarding financial decisions.

question_en: Q3 Which of the following financial products do you currently have or have you had? [MULTIPLE ANSWERS] | Base: All
question_type_explanation: This question asks for citizens' current financial products they have or had, not their opinion about what the EU should do.

question_en: Q4 Which of these products and services did you purchase in another EU Member State? [MULTIPLE ANSWERS] | Base: IF Q3 not equal to "None" or "Don't know"
question_type_explanation: This question asks for respondents' past behavior, not their forward-looking opinion about what the EU should do.

question_en: Q5 In the last 5 years, have you changed provider of any of these products and services? [MULTIPLE ANSWERS] | Base: IF Q3 not equal to "None" or "Don't know"
question_type_explanation: This question asks for changes in provider over the past 5 years, not expressing a forward-looking opinion about what the EU should do.

question_en: Q6 You replied that you do not have any investment products (e.g. funds, stocks or bonds). Can you explain why not? [MULTIPLE ANSWERS] | Base: IF Q3 not equal to "An investment product (funds, stocks or bonds)"
question_type_explanation: This question asks for reasons why the respondent does not have investment products, which is a behavioral/personal question.

question_en: Q7 Thinking about the area where you live, how easy or difficult is it to withdraw cash at ATMs or physical bank branches? | Base: All
question_type_explanation: This question asks for an opinion about the ease of withdrawing cash, not a forward-looking policy preference.

question_en: Q8 A digital euro would be an electronic form of money, issued by the European Central Bank. It would be used alongside traditional coins and banknotes, and other electronic means of payment,  and it would be accessible to all citizens and firms. Have you heard that discussions are taking place about the possible introduction of a digital euro? | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about the possible introduction of a digital euro, which is forward-looking.

question_en: Q9_1 How often do you use the following digital financial services in your daily life? A mobile banking app or website to authenticate your identity and check your balance | Base: All
question_type_explanation: This question asks for behavioral information about the respondent's usage of digital financial services, not their opinion on what the EU should do.

question_en: Q9_2 How often do you use the following digital financial services in your daily life? A mobile banking/payment app or website to pay either in shops or online | Base: All
question_type_explanation: This question asks for the frequency of using a digital financial service, not expressing an opinion about what the EU should do.

question_en: Q9_3 How often do you use the following digital financial services in your daily life? A mobile app to invest in financial markets | Base: All
question_type_explanation: This question asks for the frequency of using a digital financial service, not expressing an opinion about what the EU should do.

question_en: Q9_4 How often do you use the following digital financial services in your daily life? A mobile app to invest in crypto-assets | Base: All
question_type_explanation: parse_error

question_en: Q10_1 Sustainable finance refers to the process of taking environmental, social and governance considerations into account when making decisions in the financial sector. To what extent you agree or disagree with the following statements? I know whether my private savings and investments are invested into sustainable economic activities | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion on whether their private savings and investments are invested into sustainable economic activities, which is a forward-looking opinion about what the EU should encourage or promote in the financial sector.

question_en: Q10_2 Sustainable finance refers to the process of taking environmental, social and governance considerations into account when making decisions in the financial sector. To what extent you agree or disagree with the following statements? I receive information on the sustainability impact of financial products or services | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion on whether they receive information on the sustainability impact of financial products, which is a forward-looking opinion about what the EU should do (provide information) in the financial sector.

question_en: Q10_3 Sustainable finance refers to the process of taking environmental, social and governance considerations into account when making decisions in the financial sector. To what extent you agree or disagree with the following statements? If I know that a financial product is sustainable, I am more likely to invest in it | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what they SHOULD do when investing in financial products, based on sustainability considerations.

question_en: Q10_4 Sustainable finance refers to the process of taking environmental, social and governance considerations into account when making decisions in the financial sector. To what extent you agree or disagree with the following statements? It is important to me that my savings and investments do not fund economic activities that have a negative impact on the planet | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what they think should happen with their savings and investments, which is a forward-looking opinion.

question_en: Q11 Across the EU, you have basic rights when you open a bank account, transfer money, take out a loan or buy insurance products. Have you ever considered that your rights were breached doing any of the following? Please select all that apply. [MULTIPLE ANSWERS] | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks about past breaches of rights, not forward-looking opinions on what the EU should do.

question_en: Q12 And when you felt your rights were breached, did you then complain to anyone? [MULTIPLE ANSWERS] | Base: IF Q11 = 1/2/3/4/5/6 [If rights were breached]
question_type_explanation: It asks about past actions related to breached rights, not forward-looking opinions about what the EU should do.

question_en: Q13 How satisfied were you with the way your complaint was handled? | Base: IF Q12 = 2/3/4/5 [If a complaint was raised]
question_type_explanation: It asks for satisfaction with a past complaint handling process

question_en: Q1a Have you already used euro banknotes or coins? | Base: All
question_type_explanation: References an EXISTING policy/program as already in place: Euro banknotes and coins

question_en: Q1b You said you already used euro banknotes or coins. Was it…? | Base: If already used euro banknotes or coins at Q1a
question_type_explanation: References an EXISTING policy/program as already in place

question_en: Q2 Which of the following statements do you think is correct? | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what they think is correct, which can be interpreted as a forward-looking opinion.

question_en: Q3 And which of these following statements do you think is correct? | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what they think is correct, which can be interpreted as a forward-looking opinion.

question_en: Q4a According to you, how many EU countries have already introduced the euro? | Base: All
question_type_explanation: References an existing policy as already in place

question_en: Q4b In your opinion, is (THIS COUNTRY) ready to introduce the euro? | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what a country SHOULD do, introducing the euro.

question_en: Q4c When do you think the euro will be introduced in [THIS COUNTRY]? | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about when the euro will be introduced in a specific country, which is forward-looking as it involves expressing what should happen.

question_en: Q5 To what extent do you feel informed about the euro? Do you feel: | Base: All
question_type_explanation: This question asks for the respondent's level of information about the euro, not their opinion on what the EU should do.

question_en: Q6 Before the euro is introduced in [THIS COUNTRY] there would normally be an information campaign on the changeover. For each of the following institutions or groups, please tell me if you would trust information they provide on the changeover to the euro? [MULTIPLE ANSWERS] | Base: All
question_type_explanation: This question asks about trust in institutions providing information on a changeover that is already planned, not about what the EU should do.

question_en: Q7 In your view, which of the following issues about the euro are essential to be covered in priority by the information campaign on the changeover to the euro in [THIS COUNTRY]? [MULTIPLE ANSWERS] | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion on what should be prioritized in an information campaign, which is a forward-looking opinion about the EU's actions.

question_en: Q8 Here is a list of various possible information campaign actions on the euro changeover. Could you tell me for each of them whether you would find it essential? [MULTIPLE ANSWERS] | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion on what the EU SHOULD do in terms of information campaign actions on the euro changeover.

question_en: Q9 What consequences do you think the introduction of the euro has had in the countries that are already using the euro? | Base: All
question_type_explanation: References an existing policy as already in place

question_en: Q10_1 Do you think the introduction of the euro would have positive or negative consequences for.…? THIS COUNTRY | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about the potential positive or negative consequences of introducing the euro, which is a forward-looking opinion about what the EU should do.

question_en: Q10_2 Do you think the introduction of the euro would have positive or negative consequences for.…? You personally | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about the potential positive or negative consequences of introducing the euro, which is a forward-looking opinion.

question_en: Q11 Generally speaking, are you personally more in favour or against the idea of introducing the euro in (THIS COUNTRY)? | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about introducing the euro in a specific country, which is a forward-looking policy preference.

question_en: Q12 When would you like the euro to become your currency? | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about when the euro should become their currency, which is a forward-looking opinion.

question_en: Q13 What impact, if any, do you think the introduction of the euro will have on prices in (THIS COUNTRY)? | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' forward-looking opinion about the potential impact of the euro on prices in their country.

question_en: Q14_1 Could you tell me for each of the following statements if you agree or disagree…? You personally will manage to adapt to the replacement of the (NATIONAL CURRENCY) by the euro | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks about personal adaptation to a change that has already occurred, not about what the EU should do in the future.

question_en: Q14_2 Could you tell me for each of the following statements if you agree or disagree…? You are concerned about abusive price setting during the changeover | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about a potential issue (abusive price setting during the changeover), which can be considered as what the EU should address.

question_en: Q14_3 Could you tell me for each of the following statements if you agree or disagree…? Adopting the euro will mean that (THIS COUNTRY) will lose control over its economic policy | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what will happen if a country adopts the euro, which is forward-looking as it involves a policy decision.

question_en: Q14_4 Could you tell me for each of the following statements if you agree or disagree…? Adopting the euro will mean that (THIS COUNTRY) will lose a part of its identity | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about what will happen if a country adopts the euro, which is forward-looking.

question_en: Q1 Do you think that, in your local area, people using or dealing drugs are a very serious problem, somewhat serious, not too serious, or not a problem at all? | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for an opinion about a local problem, not a forward-looking policy preference for the EU

question_en: Q2_1 Which of the following would you say are a problem in your local area associated with people using or dealing drugs? Drugs being too easily available | Base: If 'A problem' at Q1 (Q1=1, 2 or 3)
question_type_explanation: This question asks for a problem associated with drugs in the local area, not expressing what the EU should do.

question_en: Q2_2 Which of the following would you say are a problem in your local area associated with people using or dealing drugs? People taking hard drugs (e.g. crack, heroin, cocaine) | Base: If 'A problem' at Q1 (Q1=1, 2 or 3)
question_type_explanation: This question asks for a problem associated with drug use in the local area, not expressing an opinion about what the EU should do.

question_en: Q2_3 Which of the following would you say are a problem in your local area associated with people using or dealing drugs? People smoking cannabis in public places | Base: If 'A problem' at Q1 (Q1=1, 2 or 3)
question_type_explanation: This question asks for a problem associated with drug use in the local area, not expressing what should happen at the EU level.

question_en: Q2_4 Which of the following would you say are a problem in your local area associated with people using or dealing drugs? Children and teenagers taking drugs | Base: If 'A problem' at Q1 (Q1=1, 2 or 3)
question_type_explanation: This question asks for a problem associated with drug use in the local area, not expressing what should happen at the EU level.

question_en: Q2_5 Which of the following would you say are a problem in your local area associated with people using or dealing drugs? Drug dealers or users being intimidating to local people | Base: If 'A problem' at Q1 (Q1=1, 2 or 3)
question_type_explanation: The question asks for citizens' opinion about a potential problem associated with drug use, implying what the EU could do to address it.

question_en: Q2_6 Which of the following would you say are a problem in your local area associated with people using or dealing drugs? Conflict and violence in the community related to drug use | Base: If 'A problem' at Q1 (Q1=1, 2 or 3)

question_en: Q2_7 Which of the following would you say are a problem in your local area associated with people using or dealing drugs? Domestic violence related to drug use | Base: If 'A problem' at Q1 (Q1=1, 2 or 3)
question_type_explanation: This question asks for a problem associated with drug use in the local area, not expressing what should happen at the EU level.

question_en: Q2_8 Which of the following would you say are a problem in your local area associated with people using or dealing drugs? Traffic accidents related to drug use or combined alcohol and drug use | Base: If 'A problem' at Q1 (Q1=1, 2 or 3)
question_type_explanation: This question asks for a problem associated with drug use in the local area, not expressing what the EU should do.

question_en: Q2_9 Which of the following would you say are a problem in your local area associated with people using or dealing drugs? Poverty and unemployment related to drug use | Base: If 'A problem' at Q1 (Q1=1, 2 or 3)

question_en: Q3_1 Is drug use the most important cause, one of the causes or not a cause at all of the following types of crime in your local area? Youth crime | Base: All

question_en: Q3_2 Is drug use the most important cause, one of the causes or not a cause at all of the following types of crime in your local area? Stealing, theft and burglary | Base: All
question_type_explanation: This question asks for citizens' opinion about the cause of crime in their local area, which is not a forward-looking policy preference that parliament could act on.

question_en: Q3_3 Is drug use the most important cause, one of the causes or not a cause at all of the following types of crime in your local area? Violent crime and murder | Base: All
question_type_explanation: This question asks for citizens' opinion about the cause of crime in their local area, which is a factual/awareness question and not related to EU policies.

question_en: Q3_4 Is drug use the most important cause, one of the causes or not a cause at all of the following types of crime in your local area? Corruption and lack of trust in public officials and institutions | Base: All
question_type_explanation: This question asks for citizens' opinion about the cause of crime in their local area, which is not a forward-looking policy preference that parliament could act on.

question_en: Q4 In your local area, do you think that in the past few years problems caused by drugs have: | Base: All

question_en: Q5_1 For each of the following statements could you say if you strongly agree, agree, disagree or strongly disagree: The COVID-19 pandemic resulted in higher use of illegal drugs in my local area | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for an opinion about a situation that has already occurred, not a forward-looking policy preference.

question_en: Q5_2 For each of the following statements could you say if you strongly agree, agree, disagree or strongly disagree: The COVID-19 pandemic resulted in more drug problems in my local area | Base: All
question_type_explanation: The question asks for an opinion about a situation that has already occurred, not a forward-looking policy preference.

question_en: Q6_1 For each of the following statements could you say if you strongly agree, agree, disagree or strongly disagree: The availability and use of drugs make me feel unsafe near my home, school or place of work | Base: All

question_en: Q6_2 For each of the following statements could you say if you strongly agree, agree, disagree or strongly disagree: The availability and use of drugs have a negative impact on my personal relationships | Base: All
